negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: industry_028
prompt: A close-up shot captures a blacksmithing scene in a dimly lit workshop. The focal point is a glowing red-hot metal rod resting on a sturdy, dark anvil, marked with a distinct "U" shape. The anvil, worn from use, sits prominently in the foreground. In the background, a bright, flickering flame from a forge casts a warm, orange glow, illuminating the workspace and creating a stark contrast against the dark surroundings. A gloved hand, clad in protective gear, holds a hammer above the anvil, poised to strike the heated metal. The hand descends, delivering a forceful blow to the metal, which begins to curve under the pressure. The rhythmic motion of the hammering continues, with the metal gradually taking on a more defined shape. The final frame showcases the skill and precision of the blacksmith, with the metal significantly shaped.
